definition: A pattern of sounds or beats you can feel.
sentence: I tapped my foot to the rhythm of the song.

definition: Someone you like and spend time with.
sentence: My best friend likes the same games as me.

definition: A very big body of salty water.
sentence: We saw dolphins jumping in the ocean.

definition: A word that tells you the reason for something.
sentence: I wore a coat because it was cold outside.

definition: A sweet brown treat made from cocoa beans.
sentence: She ate a piece of chocolate after lunch.

definition: A huge gray animal with a long trunk.
sentence: The elephant sprayed water with its trunk.

definition: A place full of books you can borrow.
sentence: We went to the library to find a story book.

definition: A two-wheeled vehicle you ride by pedaling.
sentence: He rode his bicycle around the park.

definition: A page that shows the days and months of the year.
sentence: I marked my birthday on the calendar.

definition: A person who lives near your house.
sentence: Our neighbor waved when we walked by.

definition: Not the same as something else.
sentence: These two dogs are very different from each other.

definition: Something that matters a lot.
sentence: It is important to drink water every day.

definition: The thing you like best.
sentence: Pizza is my favorite food.

definition: The people you live with and love.
sentence: My family eats dinner together every night.

definition: A place where children go to learn.
sentence: I walk to school every morning.

definition: Feeling really good and joyful.
sentence: She felt happy when she got a new puppy.

definition: A place where flowers or vegetables grow.
sentence: We planted tomatoes in the garden.

definition: A game where you put pieces together.
sentence: He finished the puzzle in one hour.

definition: To keep something in your mind.
sentence: Try to remember to bring your lunch.

definition: All the things you know.
sentence: Reading books helps you build knowledge.

definition: Something you have lived through or done.
sentence: Going to camp was a fun experience.

definition: A choice you make.
sentence: It was a hard decision to make.

definition: A round bag of air you can play with.
sentence: The red balloon floated up into the sky.

definition: A huge animal that lived a long, long time ago.
sentence: My favorite dinosaur is the T-Rex.

definition: Colorful arcs of light in the sky after rain.
sentence: We saw a beautiful rainbow after the storm.
